name: aiap_auto_evolution
description: AIAP Auto Evolution — automated multi-round AIAP evolution orchestrator. Plans evolution direction per round (web search + anti-over-engineering + human habit alignment), executes via nested Creator intent execution, validates quality. AUTO/SEMI/SUPERVISED modes. Preserves successful rounds on failure. v1.2.0: protocol alignment (flow_format §3.1), AISIP/DUAL format detection (planner+executor+validator), search query safety hardening (OWASP 2026 5-layer defense), path traversal guard, file integrity verification. v1.1.0: quality baseline generation (MF17), cross-round trend analysis, provenance chain (SLSA), convergence detection, protocol alignment hardening.

skills.name: BatchEvolve
skills.description: Evolve an AIAP program for N rounds automatically or with user supervision.

skills.name: Status
skills.description: Check progress of ongoing evolution batch.

skills.name: Abort
skills.description: Stop an ongoing evolution batch, preserving successful rounds.

skills.name: Resume
skills.description: Resume an interrupted evolution batch from where it stopped.

skills.name: History
skills.description: View past evolution batch results and quality trajectories.

safety_card.risk_justification: T4 trust level with full workspace file_system write access. Executes nested Creator pipeline which modifies target programs. Multi-round automation increases blast radius of quality issues.
safety_card.data_handling: Pre-round snapshots for rollback safety. Evolution reports persisted to target program directories. No external data sharing.
safety_card.limitations: Text-only. Cannot auto-evolve (infinite nesting blocked). Max 10 rounds per batch (configurable cap). AUTO mode stops on first failure. Path traversal guard rejects ../ and encoded sequences. Search queries sanitized to alphanumeric (OWASP 2026). Dual-format validation advisory only.
